data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design ensures elements are easily clickable and accessible.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimized choices to streamline user interactions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Consistent experience aligned with user expectations.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items to naturally guide user behavior.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of content, consistent spacing

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limiting information to prevent cognitive overload.
